name: @nysds/nys-icon
description: The Icon component from the NYS Design System.

scripts.build: npm run extract-icons && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly && vite build
scripts.test: npm run extract-icons && vite build && wtr
scripts.build:watch: npm run extract-icons && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly && vite build --watch
scripts.test:watch: npm run extract-icons && vite build && wtr --watch

author: New York State Design System Team
